name: Manifest Change Guard
description: When manifest.json is edited, verify the changes don't break extension functionality — permissions, host_permissions, content_scripts, and web_accessible_resources are all critical.

then.prompt:
manifest.json was just edited in the Synapse AI Link extension. Verify the following are still intact:
1. manifest_version is still 3
2. background.service_worker is 'background.js' with type 'module'
3. content_scripts still covers all 5 LLM URLs: chatgpt.com/*, chat.openai.com/*, claude.ai/*, gemini.google.com/*, perplexity.ai/*
4. host_permissions still includes api.groq.com/*, all *.googleapis.com/*, *.firestore.googleapis.com/*, wss://*.firestore.googleapis.com/*
5. web_accessible_resources still lists libs/pdf.min.js, libs/pdf.worker.min.js, libs/mammoth.min.js
6. externally_connectable still allows https://synapse-ai.app/*
Report any missing or changed critical field.
